creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192943
remotebox-2.5.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates remotebox to 2.5. 

Changes by upstream:
- added support for VNC
- improved support for FreeBSD systems
- see also: http://remotebox.knobgoblin.org.uk/

Changes to the port:
- added VNC viewers (tigervnc + vinagre) to options
- also added krdc (RDP/VNC viewer) for KDE4/KDE5 to options
- changed option behavior for RDP/VNC viewers to give users the freedom to select their desired RDP/VNC viewers

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 / all options tested) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
